---
pagetitle: "Murat Abus"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-photo">
    <img src="avatar.png" alt="Murat Abus" />
  </div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="hero-name">Murat Abus</p>
    <p class="hero-role">Post-Doctoral Fellow in Political Science</p>
    <p class="hero-affiliation">GOVERNMENT, LAW &amp; POLICY · ARKANSAS STATE UNIVERSITY</p>
    <p>
      I am an incoming Post-Doctoral Fellow in Political Science at the
      <a href="https://www.astate.edu/colleges/liberal-arts-and-communication/government-law-and-policy/index.html">Department of Government, Law &amp; Policy</a> at Arkansas State University. I am an affiliate researcher at the <a href="https://www.astate.edu/research/institute-for-rural-initiatives.html">Institute for Rural Initiatives</a>. I am also an affiliate researcher at the <a href="https://idjc.syracuse.edu">Institure for Democracy, Journalism and Citizenship</a>. 
    </p>
     <p>
      I am interested in election science, political behavior, public administration, political communication, public opinion, and local politics. I primarily study how decline in local news affects outcomes at the local level, how background factors affect election administration, how candidate selection processes differ across countries, how local politics and election administration interact in rural settings, and how governments use public administration to generate advantage.
    </p>
    <p>
      I am originally from Turkey. I grew up in <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Erzurum">Erzurum</a> in Eastern Turkey with a city center altitude of 6200 feet. I speak Russian in addition to English. 
    </p>

    <div class="social-links">
      <a href="uploads/cv-abus.pdf" target="_blank" aria-label="CV">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/><line x1="16" y1="13" x2="8" y2="13"/><line x1="16" y1="17" x2="8" y2="17"/></svg>
      </a>
      <a href="mailto:mabus@astate.edu" aria-label="Email">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
      </a>
      <a href="https://twitter.com/muratabus" target="_blank" aria-label="X / Twitter">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18.244 2.25h3.308l-7.227 8.26 8.502 11.24H16.17l-4.714-6.231-5.401 6.231H2.744l7.73-8.835L1.254 2.25H8.08l4.259 5.631 5.905-5.631zm-1.161 17.52h1.833L7.084 4.126H5.117z"/></svg>
      </a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=U80XvUEAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao" target="_blank" aria-label="Google Scholar">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 25 25" fill="currentColor"><path d="M10.93 2.045c-.547.366-3.22 2.14-5.938 3.945C2.272 7.794.05 9.286.05 9.304c0 .019.136.11.305.2.167.096 2.85 1.583 5.965 3.31l5.656 3.143.144-.074c.082-.04 2.169-1.232 4.642-2.642l4.493-2.568.027 7.947h2.668V9.319l-3.46-2.32c-4.664-3.124-8.392-5.586-8.484-5.606-.045-.008-.527.287-1.076.652M5.355 16.633l.014 2.005 3.31 1.987 3.31 1.982 3.337-2 3.332-2.005V16.62c0-1.092-.013-1.983-.027-1.983s-1.318.782-2.9 1.741l-3.306 1.996-.431.256-1.32-.791a604.12 604.12 0 0 1-3.286-1.979l-2.005-1.21c-.024-.008-.032.883-.027 1.983"/></svg>
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/murabus" target="_blank" aria-label="GitHub">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 0C5.374 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23A11.509 11.509 0 0 1 12 5.803c1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576C20.566 21.797 24 17.3 24 12c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"/></svg>
      </a>
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0153-5010" target="_blank" aria-label="ORCID">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 0C5.372 0 0 5.372 0 12s5.372 12 12 12 12-5.372 12-12S18.628 0 12 0zM7.369 4.378c.525 0 .947.431.947.947s-.422.947-.947.947a.95.95 0 0 1-.947-.947c0-.525.422-.947.947-.947zm-.722 3.038h1.444v10.041H6.647V7.416zm3.562 0h3.9c3.712 0 5.344 2.653 5.344 5.025 0 2.578-2.016 5.016-5.325 5.016h-3.919V7.416zm1.444 1.303v7.444h2.297c3.272 0 3.9-2.522 3.9-3.722 0-2.128-1.284-3.722-3.853-3.722h-2.344z"/></svg>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Murat-Abus" target="_blank" aria-label="ResearchGate">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><text x="2" y="18" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="800" font-size="13" fill="currentColor">RG</text></svg>
      </a>
      <a href="https://dataverse.harvard.edu/dataverse/harvard?q=%22Abus,%20Murat%22" target="_blank" aria-label="Harvard Dataverse">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 19.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 17H20"/><path d="M6.5 2H20v20H6.5A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 4 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 2z"/><line x1="9" y1="7" x2="15" y2="7"/><line x1="9" y1="11" x2="15" y2="11"/></svg>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
